TAA_Support_CDA_Alawys_in_2TC - Static variable in class com.newland.nsdk.core.api.internal.emvl2.type.EmvConst
CDA always requested in a second Gen AC when successful host response is received, with TC request
TAA_Support_CDA_Always_in_ARQC - Static variable in class com.newland.nsdk.core.api.internal.emvl2.type.EmvConst
CDA always requested in a first Gen AC, ARQC request
TAA_Support_CDAFail_Detected - Static variable in class com.newland.nsdk.core.api.internal.emvl2.type.EmvConst
Device capable of detecting CDA Failure before TAA
TAA_Support_DAC_after_1GenAC - Static variable in class com.newland.nsdk.core.api.internal.emvl2.type.EmvConst
Does the terminal process DAC after first GenAC
TAA_Support_DAC_before_1GenAC - Static variable in class com.newland.nsdk.core.api.internal.emvl2.type.EmvConst
Does the terminal process DAC prior to first GenAC
TAA_Support_DAC_OnlineFail - Static variable in class com.newland.nsdk.core.api.internal.emvl2.type.EmvConst
Does the terminal process DAC as normal when unable to process online
TAA_Support_Skip_DAC_OnlineFail - Static variable in class com.newland.nsdk.core.api.internal.emvl2.type.EmvConst
Does the terminal skip DAC processing and automatically request an AAC when unable to process online
TAA_Support_TAC - Static variable in class com.newland.nsdk.core.api.internal.emvl2.type.EmvConst
Does the terminal support Terminal Action Codes

Transfers M1 card block after increment/decrement.
transfer(byte) - Method in interface com.newland.nsdk.plugin.card.api.internal.contactless.M1Card
Deprecated.
Replaced by "MifareClassicCard.transfer()" in Newland NSDK RFIC library.
transmit(byte[]) - Method in interface com.newland.nsdk.plugin.card.api.external.contactless.ExtFelicaCard
Executes APDU command with Felica card after the card is detected.
transmit(byte[]) - Method in interface com.newland.nsdk.plugin.card.api.internal.contactless.FelicaCard
Executes APDU command with Felica card.
transmit(byte[], int) - Method in interface com.newland.nsdk.plugin.card.api.internal.contactless.FelicaCard
Executes APDU command with Felica card with assigned timeout.
transmit(byte[], int, int) - Method in interface com.newland.nsdk.plugin.card.api.internal.contactless.FelicaCard
Executes APDU command with Felica card with assigned timeout.
TRM_Support_AIPBased - Static variable in class com.newland.nsdk.core.api.internal.emvl2.type.EmvConst
Performance of TRM based on AIP setting
TRM_Support_ExceptionFile - Static variable in class com.newland.nsdk.core.api.internal.emvl2.type.EmvConst
Support exception file
TRM_Support_FloorLimit - Static variable in class com.newland.nsdk.core.api.internal.emvl2.type.EmvConst
Floor Limit Checking, mandatory for terminal with offline capability
TRM_Support_RandomSelect - Static variable in class com.newland.nsdk.core.api.internal.emvl2.type.EmvConst
Random Transaction Selections, mandatory for offline terminal with online capability, except when cardholder controlled
TRM_Support_TransLog - Static variable in class com.newland.nsdk.core.api.internal.emvl2.type.EmvConst
Support transaction log
TRM_Support_VelocityCheck - Static variable in class com.newland.nsdk.core.api.internal.emvl2.type.EmvConst
Velocity checking, mandatory for for terminal with offline capability
TRM_Use_EMV_LogPolicy - Static variable in class com.newland.nsdk.core.api.internal.emvl2.type.EmvConst
EMV has a different log policy with PBOC2, marked here
